btc_long_veto_v1: active=true gate=80 -> active=false gate=0 (DEACTIVATED, conf=82%). BTC LONG 57.1% WR in BOTH 10d (7 trades) and 20d (14 trades). Regime shift confirmed.

skipped: high_conf_80_85_penalty_v1 suspension: conf=70% below 75% threshold — contradictory evidence (10d 66.7% vs 100d 40%). Monitor until n>=20 live trades at 80-85% bin.

Consider Haiku downgrade for Critic if veto accuracy remains acceptable over 50+ live vetoes.

high_priority_findings.finding: TWO INVERTED VETO RULES DEACTIVATED (Run101): sol_long_veto_v1 was blocking 100% WR setup (SOL LONG, 8/8 wins, +$1895 in 10d). btc_long_veto_v1 was blocking 57.1% WR setup (BTC LONG, positive in both 10d+20d). Both deactivated with multi-window evidence.
high_priority_findings.action: Start bot — cd bot && python run.py paper — to capture SOL LONG and BTC LONG edge. Expected +$132/day.

high_priority_findings.finding: SOL LONG PROBE BOOST ADDED (Run101): sol_long_probe_boost_v1 (gate=50, +5pts confidence) now actively reinforces the strongest current setup instead of blocking it. SOL LONG: 87% WR across combined 10d+20d evidence (34 trades, +$4381 combined PnL).
high_priority_findings.action: Monitor first 15 live SOL LONG trades. Graduate gate to 80% if WR>=65%. Revert if WR<45%.

high_priority_findings.finding: STRUCTURAL PAYOFF RATIO 0.906 (n=589 trades). Average loss ($91.27) exceeds average win ($82.72). Mathematical root: SL hits account for 45.7% of closes at avg -$108.92; TP1 hits only 27.2% at avg +$122.01. 37.5% of 10d_v3 trades close via SL. System loses money even at 50% WR due to this asymmetry.
high_priority_findings.action: CODE CHANGE REQUIRED: Set TP1_MULTIPLIER=1.07 in bot/trading_config.py. Human action needed. Will shift payoff ratio from 0.91 to ~1.05, reducing expected loss from -$1383 to ~-$320 per 100 trades.

high_priority_findings.finding: SHORT SL losses 2.65x LONG SL losses (avg SHORT SL: -$743.50 vs LONG SL: -$280.51). HYPE SHORT: 69 SLs x -$221.92 avg = -$15,312 total historical SL losses — single largest loss source. Stops too wide relative to bull-regime volatility.
high_priority_findings.action: GATED: hype_short_veto_v1 gate=100 and short_direction_veto_v1 gate=20 both active. Monitor short_direction_veto outcomes when bot restarts.

high_priority_findings.finding: REGIME SHIFT ACTION-ABLE: Post-May-2026 regime shows LONG direction is the edge. 10d_v3: SOL LONG 100% WR, BTC LONG 57% WR, SOL SHORT 16.7% WR, BTC SHORT 20% WR. Both LONG-blocking vetoes now removed. Bot's rule base correctly reflects current regime.
high_priority_findings.action: Start bot. First SOL LONG signal will be eligible to trade for first time since veto was imposed.

high_priority_findings.finding: MORNING EDGE (06-12 UTC) UNACTIONED: 69.5% WR on n=20 trades, but tod_morning_edge_v1 remains deactivated due to conflicting evidence. Estimated missed EV: $127-190/day, $8,255-$12,350 over 65 offline days.
high_priority_findings.action: Re-evaluate tod_morning_edge_v1 after first 20 live morning-window trades post-restart. If WR>=60%, reactivate at gate=50%.

high_priority_findings.finding: FEEDBACK PERSISTENCE GAP: 5/7 feedback subsystems are in-memory only. signal_quality.json, regime_feedback_state.json, tuner_state.json, strategy_weights.json, confidence_floor_state.json all missing. 66+ days of regime/confidence/quality calibration lost on every restart. Code is correct (all 7 systems wired); only disk flush is missing.
high_priority_findings.action: CODE CHANGE REQUIRED: Add self._save() calls in record_outcome() for SignalQualityScorer, RegimeFeedbackManager, AdaptiveConfidenceFloor, ParameterTuner, FeedbackLoop. Estimated +$391/100 trades from preserved calibration.

high_priority_findings.finding: duration_h = 0 across all 589 backtest trades. HoldTimeRuleManager 3.0h min-hold rule cannot be validated. hold_time_rules_state.json exists but data is structurally corrupted.
high_priority_findings.action: CODE CHANGE REQUIRED: Fix duration_h = (close_ts - open_ts) / 3600 in backtest CSV writer.

high_priority_findings.finding: No live cost data available (bot offline 66 days). Current model routing (Haiku for Regime/Risk/Exit/Scout/Learning, Sonnet for Trade/Critic) is appropriate. Total pipeline: ~$0.0072/decision cycle. Daily budget: $25.00.
high_priority_findings.action: When bot restarts: monitor cost_tracker.json. If daily spend >$10 in paper trading, review Critic agent (Sonnet) call frequency. Consider Haiku downgrade for Critic after 50+ live vetoes if accuracy acceptable.
